pr_title: fix: continue loop after call failure instead of breaking
pr_description: Change `break` to `continue` at line 278 in `identify_potential_levers.py` When call-2 fails but call-1 succeeded, call-3 now runs instead of being silently suppressed Potentially doubles recovered levers from ~7 to ~14 in partial-failure scenarios Full cross-agent consensus from iteration 15 synthesis
